>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 品牌门店（品牌商户）文档索引

> 品牌线下门店信息管理工具，支持地图选点、文件批量上传、API接口上传三种方式录入门店。录入后可在名片展示地址、营业状态等信息，可用于商品券适用门店圈定、摇优惠按位置精准投放，有效提升用户到店转化率。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016626151.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016704437.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016626206.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4022248468.md)

## API 列表
- [创建品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782988.md)
- [查询品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783027.md)
- [查询品牌门店列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756646.md)
- [更新品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783036.md)
- [删除品牌门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783019.md)
- [暂停门店营业](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756637.md)
- [恢复门店营业](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756643.md)
- [绑定收款商户号](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782993.md)
- [解绑收款商户号](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783007.md)

- [创建品牌门店 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782988-go.md)
- [删除品牌门店 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783019-curl.md)

- [删除品牌门店 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783019-go.md)

- [恢复门店营业 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756643-java.md)
- [恢复门店营业 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756643-go.md)
- [暂停门店营业 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756637-curl.md)
- [暂停门店营业 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756637-java.md)
- [暂停门店营业 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756637-go.md)
- [更新品牌门店 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783036-curl.md)
- [更新品牌门店 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783036-java.md)
- [更新品牌门店 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783036-go.md)
- [查询品牌门店 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783027-curl.md)
- [查询品牌门店 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783027-java.md)
- [查询品牌门店 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783027-go.md)
- [查询品牌门店列表 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756646-curl.md)
- [查询品牌门店列表 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756646-java.md)
- [查询品牌门店列表 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016756646-go.md)

- [绑定收款商户号 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782993-java.md)
- [绑定收款商户号 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782993-go.md)
- [解绑收款商户号 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783007-curl.md)
- [解绑收款商户号 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783007-java.md)
- [解绑收款商户号 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015783007-go.md)
